nasb.text: You shall eat it within your gates; the unclean and the clean alike may eat it, as a gazelle or a deer.

esv.text: You shall eat it within your towns. The unclean and the clean alike may eat it, as though it were a gazelle or a deer.

cnv.text: 你可以在家裡吃，不潔淨的人和潔淨的人都一樣可以吃，像吃羚羊和鹿一樣。

ccb.text: 要在你们的城里吃这些牛羊。洁净的人和不洁净的人都可以吃，就像吃羚羊和鹿一样。
